name: Deliverables and Acceptance
text: The Service Provider undertakes to deliver the specified services and all associated deliverables in accordance with the terms of this Agreement.
invalid_if: The contract is solely for the sale of goods and not services.
The service involves continuous effort without distinct, identifiable deliverables.
title: Deliverables
dispute_hotspots: Deemed acceptance — client claims it never reviewed but time expired
Moving goalposts — client rejects deliverable repeatedly without objective criteria
